nasb.text: Now Solomon the son of David established himself securely over his kingdom, and the Lord his God was with him and exalted him greatly.

esv.text: Solomon the son of David established himself in his kingdom, and the Lord his God was with him and made him exceedingly great.

cnv.text: 大衛的兒子所羅門鞏固了他對以色列的統治，耶和華他的　神也和他同在，使他十分尊大。

ccb.text: 大卫的儿子所罗门巩固了自己的王位。因为他的上帝耶和华与他同在，使他极其伟大。
